status: draft
shortDescription: "Only the creators of the JDK can create packages"
shortCorrection: "Normal developers can create packages"

---
The people who created the Java Development Kit (JDK) created packages
to provide us with the Java runtime library
(like `java.lang`, or `java.util`).
Application developers can **not** create their own packages.

frontmatter.shortDescription: Only the creators of the JDK can create packages
